hooks.name: session-start-discipline-reminder
hooks.description: Display Rushee pipeline banner and check for missing context map

hooks.name: guard-no-code-before-feature-card
hooks.description: Warn if creating production Java files without a Feature Card

hooks.name: guard-domain-purity
hooks.description: Block JPA and Spring annotations from being written into the domain layer

hooks.name: guard-no-hardcoded-secrets
hooks.description: Block hardcoded passwords, API keys, and secrets in any source file

hooks.name: remind-migration-on-entity-change
hooks.description: Remind developer to create a Flyway migration when a JPA entity is modified

hooks.name: auto-run-tests-after-edit
hooks.description: After editing a test file, remind to run the test suite
